scan_output: Vulnerability openscap_031 not found in single-rule scan (possibly fixed)

llm_verdict.message: The “nullok” option that allowed authentication with empty passwords was present only in **/etc/pam.d/sssd‑shadowutils**. I removed the token using an in‑place `sed` edit and verified that no “nullok” entries remain in any file under **/etc/pam.d**. This remediation satisfies the **no_empty_passwords** rule, and a follow‑up OpenSCAP scan should now show the finding resolved.
